productDisplayName: Clarks Women Santa Cruz White Flats
description: These sandals from clarks prove that flats can be just as glamorous as heels. Wear this pair to dress up a simple churidhar or kurta. Alternatively, you can wear this with bright tops and white shorts for your beach vacation! Upper Synthetic leather toe holder with thong style straps Ankle strap looping around the ankle with a buckle closure and a strap to hold the forefoot in place Metallic link along the thong strap Comfortable footbed with an ergonomic design for a snug Fit Outsole TPU outsole with upraised heel with a heel patch Textured grooves on forefoot shoe Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
